* Leonardo is fascinated by the idea of a painter using 48 tiles, each requiring 4 different colors of paint.  
* The painter needed 192 total color tiles, as 48 tiles × 4 colors = 192.  
* Each color of paint comes in bottles that can paint 10 tiles, so the painter needed 192 ÷ 10 = 19.2 bottles.  
* The painter needed 20 bottles of each color, as 19.2 rounds up to 20.  
* The painter used 20 bottles of each color, ensuring that each color was fully used for the fresco.
